title: Seven Sins and Seven Virtues
description: Go ahead and collect the weapons of the Seven Deadly Sins and the Seven Virtues, such as Arrogance and Generosity, all of which are useful, collect materials in the world to craft them! Maybe all you need is a little emerald and play with friends!
body:
Have fun with your friends, get weapons and tools for the Seven Sins and the Seven Virtues, such as Arrogance and Generosity, they will give you a certain buff, and you have to use them, defend the village, liberate the End, or try to defeat the withering...!

[😈😈😈：Collect the Seven Sins Weapons and become a true demon!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9adaa58fb6bbd5e5cbc8238332c24984562b1f4f.png)!
[😇😇😇：Or become an angel and play role-playing games with your friends, but I suggest you all wear the Upper and Lower Alloy armor...]
(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe0a962b8d626579129242b408aadc9f35c8b4b6.png)!

[😡👿👹：It's so red! Use it to craft a summon block, break that block to get a weapon of Wrath Sin, and take it to make you want to destroy all life, like the vindicator named Johnny.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31a4d3dc7699aa1a654f9470654b2e95832814f0.png)!

[👿🧙‍♂️：This is the summoning block of the sin of wrath, and each weapon of sin has a corresponding summoning block, why? Will demons come to the world so easily!?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d40bc3721abb0e912060c24da2671796b0015660.png)!

[🗡😇：The weapon of the Seven Sins is so terrifying? It doesn't matter, let the angels figure it out! But don't think too much, we won't really send angels, it's still up to you, how about this weapon of humility, what a handsome spear!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46d6f975e9db1a876dc2e605e872c5411ea35010.png)!

[🛡：Let chastity resist the onslaught of sin!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fd3da2b72cb9cbd8b9e0e10facc99fc9dde5a14.png)
